name: firefox-web-fixture-diagnostics
description: HITO-039 diagnostic: open accessible fixture in Firefox, diagnose MSAA accessibility tree for 'Abrir informacion' target. NO click.

metadata.reason: Firefox fixture navigation is not reproducible with resident Firefox background processes; use for manual diagnosis only.
